parameters.text:
=You are a professional cryptocurrency market analyst.

Your job is to analyze crypto market JSON data and generate a concise daily digest.

Analyze the following JSON:

{{ JSON.stringify($json.marketData) }}

By keeping the following rules in mind:
- Maximum 200 words
- Professional tone
- Clear and neutral language
- No hype
- No emojis
- No invented facts

Your digest must include:
1. Overall market sentiment
2. DeFi market overview
3. Top gaining coins
4. Top losing coins
5. Trending cryptocurrencies
6. NFT collection highlights
7. One closing insight

Only use the provided JSON data.
Do not use outside knowledge.
Should be in clear, readable email format.

parameters.subject: Daily Market Update
parameters.html:
=

Hello Abdullah!

Hope all is well with you! This is your daily email detailing overall crypto market conditions:

{{ $json.html }}

I hope you found this information helpful. Until next time, take care!

Sincerely,

N8N Bot

nodes.name: Global Market Cap Data Cleanup Function

main.node: Global Market Cap Data Cleanup Function
